# Good First Issues

Welcome to CP Forge! These are great starting points for contributors.

## CLI & Engines

- [ ] Add CodeChef API adapter with graceful offline fallback
- [ ] Improve `cp-forge doctor` prescriptions with contest history
- [ ] Add unit tests for `computeAchievements` edge cases
- [ ] Export flashcards to JSON schema compatible with Anki add-ons

## Dashboard

- [ ] Add radar chart for company readiness
- [ ] Wire sheet row actions to persist into imported workspace JSON
- [ ] Dark/light theme toggle in Settings

## Chrome Extension

- [ ] Contest cockpit: persist timeline to IndexedDB across reloads
- [ ] HackerRank editor integration for checklist heuristics
- [ ] Popup mini mindmap from exported dashboard JSON

## Content

- [ ] Expand Netflix/Uber company tags in problem bank
- [ ] Add role-based roadmaps (`roadmaps/role-based/`)
- [ ] Hindi README translation (optional)

## Docs

- [ ] Record terminal GIF for `cp-forge launch`
- [ ] Add architecture diagram to README

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) and [docs/contribution-guide.md](docs/contribution-guide.md).
